title: Senior/Sales Engineer/Manager (industrial/marine/valves)
description:
What you'll be doing

  • Proactively identify and pursue new business opportunities within your designated market segments

  • Develop and maintain strong relationships with key customers, providing technical expertise and consultative sales support

  • Understand customer needs and requirements, and provide tailored solutions to meet their specific challenges

  • Collaborate with the wider team to prepare and deliver high-quality sales proposals and presentations

  • Participate in industry events, conferences and trade shows to expand the company's market presence

  • Monitor and report on market trends, competitor activity and customer feedback to inform the company's strategic direction

  • Contribute to the development and implementation of effective sales strategies and processes


What we're looking for

  • Diploma / Degree in Engineering or a related field

  • Minimum 3 years' experience in a sales engineering or technical sales role, preferably within the industrial, marine or valves sectors.

  • Strong technical knowledge and understanding of industrial products, systems and applications

  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to build lasting relationships with customers

  • Proven track record of achieving and exceeding sales targets

  • Ability to work independently, while also collaborating effectively within a team environment

HOW TO APPLY:

Interested applicants, please click on “Apply Now” or submit your resume to ref68@trustrecruit.com.sg

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Important Note: Trust Recruit Pte Ltd is committed to safeguarding your personal data in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA).

Please read our privacy statement on our corporate website www.trustrecruit.com.sg 

Trust Recruit Pte Ltd

EA Personnel: John Angeline

EA Personnel Reg No: R1544851

postedCompany.description:
Trust Recruit is Singapore’s leading relationship-based human resource and recruitment firm.


With more than 20 years of collective consulting experience, we provide personalized workforce solutions for our corporate clients, ranging from multinational corporations to the public sector, as well as small and medium enterprises.


At Trust Recruit, integrity and reliability permeate every level of our recruitment process.


TRUST is our currency of interactions; be it with our valued clients, talented job-seekers, or our own employees. Through our premium staffing services, we are committed to connecting and developing quality relationships between candidates and companies.
